parameters.content:
## Laundrofast problem statement
We are **Laundrofast**, a laundromat business looking to build an automated system in need of a skilled freelancer.

We have a form containing customer name, contact number, email, subscription type (One-Time and Recurring), and subscription plan (Basic, Standard, and Premium).

We want a system where everyone gets a welcome email when they fill a form, the details they filled are submitted in a CRM. Then, regardless of their subscription plan, everyone that is opting for One-Time gets sent to FACTORY A email (their name, email, and subscription type only). Everyone choosing recurring payment is sent to FACTORY B email (their name, email, and subscription type only).

Now for those that are premium and recurring, all their details should be sent to our VIP LUXURY TEAM email, while those that are premium and one-time should have all their details sent to our EXPRESS DELUXE TEAM email.
 to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

Factory A

Recurring Order

A new customer has placed a recurring laundry order

A new customer has signed up for a Recurring subscription with Laundrofast. Please review the details below and prepare for order processing.

Customer Information
Full Name

Email Address

Phone Number
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Phone Number'] }}
Subscription Plan
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Sub Plan'] }}
Order Type
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Subscription Type'] }}
Recurring Service
⚠️ Important: This is a recurring order. Customer is not on a one-time subscription plan. Process as a single service request.
Order Submitted
Next Steps for Factory A
✓
Confirm Order Receipt Acknowledge this order in the factory management system within 1 hour.
📞
Contact Customer Reach out to schedule pickup time and confirm service details.
📦
Prepare for Pickup Assign driver and prepare pickup materials for scheduled collection.
🧺
Process & Complete Clean, fold, and prepare for delivery according to service standards.
🏭 Factory A Operations

This is an automated notification from Laundrofast.
For questions, contact operations at ops@laundrofast.com
© 2026 Laundrofast Factory Management System

parameters.subject: Premium and One Time Customer
parameters.message:
= Welcome to Laundrofast - Premium One-Time Service
🫧
Laundrofast
⭐ Premium Service

Welcome aboard,
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Customer Name'].split(' ')[0] }}! 👋

Experience our premium one-time laundry service.

Hi {{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Customer Name'].split(' ')[0] }},
Thank you for choosing our Premium service! Your Laundrofast account is ready, and you're all set to experience our top-tier laundry care.

Your Premium Plan
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Sub Plan'] }}✨
{{ $('STORE CUSTOMER DATA').item.json['Subscription Type'] }}Service
  • ✓
    Express 24-hour turnaround
  • ✓
    Premium fabric care
  • ✓
    White glove delivery
  • ✓
    Priority customer support
  • ✓
    Eco-friendly detergents
  • ✓
    Free stain treatment
✨ Premium Perks Included
🏃
Express Service Get your laundry back in just 24 hours with our expedited processing.
🧴
Premium Care Products We use luxury, eco-friendly detergents that are gentle on fabrics and the planet.
🎯
Stain Removal Expert Complimentary advanced stain treatment for those tough-to-remove marks.
Here's what to do next
1
Schedule Your Premium Pickup Choose your preferred time — we offer same-day pickup for Premium customers.
2
Add Special Instructions Let us know about any fabric preferences, stains, or special handling needs.
3
Enjoy White Glove Service Relax while we deliver your fresh, perfectly folded laundry right to your door.
📞 Contact Us
🫧 Laundrofast

Questions? Reach us at support@laundrofast.com
You're receiving this because you signed up for Premium service at Laundrofast.
© 2026 Laundrofast. All rights reserved.

📘 📸 🐦
